create_file_with_content: create a new file at a given path with the specified content string
overwrite_existing_file: overwrite an existing file with new content and create parent directories as needed
resolve_file_path: resolve a relative or absolute file path against the tool context working directory
check_write_permission: check and return a permission prompt message for writing to a specified file path
sync_lsp_diagnostics: sync the written file content with the LSP server and collect any diagnostics
